# Pull Request — OmniVoice AI

## Summary
Describe the purpose of this pull request.

Include:
- What problem this PR solves
- Key architectural or behavior changes
- Relevant issue or task reference

Example:
- Adds new voice intent handler for order status
- Improves call routing logic
- Fixes API authentication issue

---

## AI / Voice Agent Impact
Indicate whether this change affects AI conversation behavior.

- [ ] No AI behavior changes
- [ ] Conversation flow updated
- [ ] New intent or response logic added
- [ ] Voice call handling updated
- [ ] AI sales or booking flow updated

Details:

Describe the voice interaction changes if applicable.

---

## API / Integration Impact
Check if integrations are affected.

- [ ] No API changes
- [ ] Internal API updated
- [ ] Webhook behavior changed
- [ ] Telephony provider integration updated
- [ ] E-commerce integration updated

Notes:

Explain API compatibility or migration needs.

---

## CI/CD Checklist
Ensure repository automation remains healthy.

- [ ] Lint and tests pass locally
- [ ] CI workflow passes
- [ ] Security workflow passes or has approved exceptions
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] AGENTS.md policies respected

---

## Testing
Explain how this change was tested.

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Conversation flow tested
- [ ] API endpoints tested
- [ ] Manual verification performed

Test notes:

Describe how reviewers can reproduce tests.

---

## Security & Data Privacy
Confirm compliance with security policies.

- [ ] No sensitive credentials committed
- [ ] Customer data handled safely
- [ ] Logging does not expose PII
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed

---

## Deployment Notes

Environment(s):

dev / staging / production

Expected impact:

Describe performance, latency, or behavior changes.

Rollback steps:

Explain how to revert if issues occur.

---

## Reviewer Notes
Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.

Examples:
- AI conversation edge cases
- Call routing logic
- External integrations
